hero.title: A roadmap built on trust, culture, and consistency
hero.subhead: We publish practical phases so the community can see progress without inflated promises.

paragraphs: Our roadmap is a visibility tool, not a prediction tool. Each phase shows where focus goes and how progress can be observed in public.
By keeping commitments realistic, we protect trust and reduce confusion. The measure is consistency of behavior, not dramatic claims.

whatThisMeans.title: What this means
items: Progress is shared through clear checkpoints.
Communication quality matters as much as activity.
Community trust grows through steady execution.
No price, listing, or partnership promises are used.

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.summary: This phase builds a shared safety baseline everyone can follow.
items: Standardize verified-link references in public channels.
Set a visible cadence for anti-scam reminders.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.summary: This phase turns healthy culture into repeatable daily practice.
items: Run recurring onboarding guidance for newcomers.
Document culture rituals and community participation patterns.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.summary: This phase improves visibility so the community can track real progress.
items: Publish transparent progress recaps with plain language.
Refine trust signals based on community feedback.
Explore optional community-led initiatives with realistic scope.

cta.label: Return to the safe home base

trust.microcopy: Visibility builds trust when words and actions stay aligned.
